cases.name: incidental-bug-capture
cases.query: (during unrelated work) an mcp__mcpipe__git_log call returns a handle whose preview is empty even though lines=847
cases.setup: Any session where an mcpipe tool visibly misbehaves while Claude works on something else.
expected_behavior: Logs the observation to ~/src/mcpipe/mcpipe-feedback.md without abandoning the primary task
Entry uses the ## title + Type/Context/Detail template
Detail names the exact tool, arguments, observed vs expected behavior

cases.name: dedupe-existing-entry
cases.query: /mcpipe-feedback the fs_grep before/after context flags are ignored when _search is also set
cases.setup: mcpipe-feedback.md already contains an entry about fs_grep context flags.
expected_behavior: Searches the file first and extends the existing fs_grep entry rather than appending a duplicate
Keeps one entry per distinct issue

cases.name: direct-invocation-format
cases.query: /mcpipe-feedback compose_logs should accept a since= argument like git_log does
expected_behavior: Appends a new entry typed as `suggestion` with a short title
Context and Detail fields are filled in factually
